languages.text:
Whenever Psyber Raven redirects an Overseer non-attack Psy Power, it gains stacking +5 Willpower for 1 round.
At the end of Overseer's turn if their Psyber Raven has 80 or more Willpower, it recovers all it's Wounds, if it is already has full Wounds, it provides all allies in {g|f:3159a138a7ee4cc48f4c88ebd3399d96}Relaying{/g} area with +1 Resolve instead

traits.locale_text:
Whenever Psyber Raven redirects an Overseer non-attack Psy Power, it gains stacking +5 Willpower for 1 round.
At the end of Overseer's turn if their Psyber Raven has 80 or more Willpower, it recovers all it's Wounds, if it is already has full Wounds, it provides all allies in {g|f:3159a138a7ee4cc48f4c88ebd3399d96}Relaying{/g} area with +1 Resolve instead

languages.text:
Whenever the psyber-raven {g|f:fcf1f3b77e3e4cf7ba2cb960e2e6028e}relays{/g} one of the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Overseer{/g}'s non-attacking {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerPowersGlossary}psychic powers{/g}, it gains +5 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willpower{/g} for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. Stacks.
If the psyber-raven's Willpower is 80 or more at the end of the Overseer's {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, it immediately heals to full. If it is already at full {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g}, it grants +1 {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}resolve{/g} to each ally in a 4-cell radius.

traits.locale_text:
Whenever the psyber-raven {g|f:fcf1f3b77e3e4cf7ba2cb960e2e6028e}relays{/g} the Overseer's non-attacking psychic power, it gains +5 Willpower for 1 round. Stacks.
If the psyber-raven's Willpower is 80 or more at the end of the Overseer's turn, it immediately heals to full. If it is already at full wounds, it grants +1 resolve to each ally in a 4-cell radius.

If the psyber-raven's Willpower is 80 or more at the end of the Overseer's {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, it immediately heals to full. If it is already at full {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g}, it grants +1 {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}resolve{/g} to each ally in a 4-cell radius.

languages.text:
Ruhsiber kuzgun, {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Gözetmen{/g}'in saldırı dışı {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerPowersGlossary}ruhsezi güçlerinden{/g} birini {g|f:fcf1f3b77e3e4cf7ba2cb960e2e6028e}aktardığında{/g} +5 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}İrade{/g} kazanır. Bu etki 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}raunt{/g} sürer. Etki üst üste birikebilir.
Gözetmen'in {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turunun{/g} sonunda ruhsiber kuzgunun İrade niteliği 80 veya üstündeyse ruhsiber kuzgun anında iyileşerek tam sağlığa ulaşır. {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}Sağlığı{/g} zaten tamsa 4 hücrelik yarıçap içindeki tüm dost birimlerine +1 {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}kararlılık{/g} kazandırır.
languages.original_text:
Whenever the psyber-raven {g|f:fcf1f3b77e3e4cf7ba2cb960e2e6028e}relays{/g} one of the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Overseer{/g}'s non-attacking {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerPowersGlossary}psychic powers{/g}, it gains +5 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willpower{/g} for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. Stacks.
If the psyber-raven's Willpower is 80 or more at the end of the Overseer's {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, it immediately heals to full. If it is already at full {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g}, it grants +1 {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}resolve{/g} to each ally in a 4-cell radius.

traits.locale_text:
Ruhsiber kuzgun, Gözetmen'in saldırı dışı ruhsezi güçlerinden birini {g|f:fcf1f3b77e3e4cf7ba2cb960e2e6028e}aktardığında{/g} +5 İrade kazanır. Bu etki 1 raunt sürer. Etki üst üste birikebilir.
Gözetmen'in turunun sonunda ruhsiber kuzgunun İrade niteliği 80 veya üstündeyse ruhsiber kuzgun anında iyileşerek tam sağlığa ulaşır. Sağlığı zaten tamsa 4 hücrelik yarıçap içindeki tüm dost birimlerine +1 kararlılık kazandırır.

Ruhsiber kuzgun, {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Gözetmen{/g}'in saldırı dışı ruhsezi güçlerinden birini {g|f:fcf1f3b77e3e4cf7ba2cb960e2e6028e}aktardığında{/g} +5 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}İrade{/g} kazanır. Bu etki 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}raunt{/g} sürer. Etki üst üste birikebilir.
Gözetmen'in {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turunun{/g} sonunda ruhsiber kuzgunun İrade niteliği 80 veya üstündeyse ruhsiber kuzgun anında iyileşerek tam sağlığa ulaşır. {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}Sağlığı{/g} zaten tamsa 4 hücrelik yarıçap içindeki tüm dost birimlerine +1 kararlılık kazandırır.

languages.text:
Cada vez que el psicocuervo {g|f:fcf1f3b77e3e4cf7ba2cb960e2e6028e}transmite{/g} uno de los {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerPowersGlossary}poderes psíquicos{/g} no ofensivos del {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}supervisor{/g}, gana +5 de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Voluntad{/g} durante 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}asalto{/g}. Este efecto es acumulativo.
Si la Voluntad del psicocuervo es de 80 o más al final del {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turno{/g} del supervisor, recupera todas sus heridas inmediatamente. Si ya tenía las {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}heridas{/g} al máximo, otorga +1 de {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}firmeza{/g} a todos los aliados que haya en un radio de 4 casillas.
languages.original_text:
Whenever the psyber-raven {g|f:fcf1f3b77e3e4cf7ba2cb960e2e6028e}relays{/g} one of the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Overseer{/g}'s non-attacking {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerPowersGlossary}psychic powers{/g}, it gains +5 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willpower{/g} for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. Stacks.
If the psyber-raven's Willpower is 80 or more at the end of the Overseer's {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, it immediately heals to full. If it is already at full {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g}, it grants +1 {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}resolve{/g} to each ally in a 4-cell radius.

traits.locale_text:
Cada vez que el psicocuervo {g|f:fcf1f3b77e3e4cf7ba2cb960e2e6028e}transmite{/g} uno de los poderes psíquicos no ofensivos del supervisor, gana +5 de Voluntad durante 1 asalto. Este efecto es acumulativo.
Si la Voluntad del psicocuervo es de 80 o más al final del turno del supervisor, recupera todas sus heridas inmediatamente. Si ya tenía las heridas al máximo, otorga +1 de firmeza a todos los aliados que haya en un radio de 4 casillas.

languages.text:
每当生化渡鸦{g|f:fcf1f3b77e3e4cf7ba2cb960e2e6028e}中继{/g}{g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}监察官{/g}的非攻击型{g|Encyclopedia:PsykerPowersGlossary}灵能能力{/g}时，{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}意志{/g}都会提高5点，持续一{g|Encyclopedia:Round}轮{/g}。此效果可叠加。
监察官的{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}结束时，如果生化渡鸦的意志不低于80点，则恢复全部{g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}生命值{/g}。如果生化渡鸦的生命值已满，则距离4格以内的所有盟友都会获得+1{g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}决心{/g}。
languages.original_text:
Whenever the psyber-raven {g|f:fcf1f3b77e3e4cf7ba2cb960e2e6028e}relays{/g} one of the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Overseer{/g}'s non-attacking {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerPowersGlossary}psychic powers{/g}, it gains +5 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willpower{/g} for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. Stacks.
If the psyber-raven's Willpower is 80 or more at the end of the Overseer's {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, it immediately heals to full. If it is already at full {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g}, it grants +1 {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}resolve{/g} to each ally in a 4-cell radius.

traits.locale_text:
每当生化渡鸦{g|f:fcf1f3b77e3e4cf7ba2cb960e2e6028e}中继{/g}监察官的非攻击型灵能能力时，意志都会提高5点，持续一轮。此效果可叠加。
监察官的回合结束时，如果生化渡鸦的意志不低于80点，则恢复全部生命值。如果生化渡鸦的生命值已满，则距离4格以内的所有盟友都会获得+1决心。

languages.text:
Wenn der Psitech-Rabe eine der {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerPowersGlossary}psionischen Kräfte{/g} des {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Aufsehers{/g} {g|f:fcf1f3b77e3e4cf7ba2cb960e2e6028e}überträgt{/g}, die keinen Angriff darstellt, erhält er 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}Runde{/g} lang +5 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willenskraft{/g}. Stapelbar.
Wenn die Willenskraft des Psitech-Raben am Ende des {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Zuges{/g} des Aufsehers 80 oder mehr beträgt, wird er sofort vollständig geheilt. Hat er bereits maximale {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}Wunden{/g}, gewährt er allen Verbündeten in einem Radius von 4 Feldern +1 {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}Entschlossenheit{/g}.
languages.original_text:
Whenever the psyber-raven {g|f:fcf1f3b77e3e4cf7ba2cb960e2e6028e}relays{/g} one of the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Overseer{/g}'s non-attacking {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerPowersGlossary}psychic powers{/g}, it gains +5 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willpower{/g} for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. Stacks.
If the psyber-raven's Willpower is 80 or more at the end of the Overseer's {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, it immediately heals to full. If it is already at full {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g}, it grants +1 {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}resolve{/g} to each ally in a 4-cell radius.

traits.locale_text:
Wenn der Psitech-Rabe eine der psionischen Kräfte des Aufsehers {g|f:fcf1f3b77e3e4cf7ba2cb960e2e6028e}überträgt{/g}, die keinen Angriff darstellt, erhält er 1 Runde lang +5 Willenskraft. Stapelbar.
Wenn die Willenskraft des Psitech-Raben am Ende des Zuges des Aufsehers 80 oder mehr beträgt, wird er sofort vollständig geheilt. Hat er bereits maximale Wunden, gewährt er allen Verbündeten in einem Radius von 4 Feldern +1 Entschlossenheit.

languages.text:
Chaque fois que la psyber-corneille {g|f:fcf1f3b77e3e4cf7ba2cb960e2e6028e}relaie{/g} un {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerPowersGlossary}pouvoir psychique{/g} offensif du {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}surveillant{/g}, il gagne +5 de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Force mentale{/g} pendant 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. Cumulable.
Si la Force mentale de la psyber-corneille est d'au moins 80 à la fin du {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tour{/g} du surveillant, elle soigne immédiatement toutes ses {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}blessures{/g}. Si ses blessures sont déjà au maximum, elle octroie +1 de {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}Détermination{/g} à tous les alliés dans un rayon de 4 cases.
languages.original_text:
Whenever the psyber-raven {g|f:fcf1f3b77e3e4cf7ba2cb960e2e6028e}relays{/g} one of the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Overseer{/g}'s non-attacking {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerPowersGlossary}psychic powers{/g}, it gains +5 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willpower{/g} for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. Stacks.
If the psyber-raven's Willpower is 80 or more at the end of the Overseer's {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, it immediately heals to full. If it is already at full {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g}, it grants +1 {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}resolve{/g} to each ally in a 4-cell radius.

traits.locale_text:
Chaque fois que la psyber-corneille {g|f:fcf1f3b77e3e4cf7ba2cb960e2e6028e}relaie{/g} un pouvoir psychique offensif du surveillant, il gagne +5 de Force mentale pendant 1 round. Cumulable.
Si la Force mentale de la psyber-corneille est d'au moins 80 à la fin du tour du surveillant, elle soigne immédiatement toutes ses blessures. Si ses blessures sont déjà au maximum, elle octroie +1 de Détermination à tous les alliés dans un rayon de 4 cases.

languages.text:
サイバーレイヴンが監督者の非攻撃超能力の一つを{g|f:fcf1f3b77e3e4cf7ba2cb960e2e6028e}引き継ぐ{/g}場合、1ラウンドの間意志力が+5される。この効果はスタックする。
監督者のターン終了時、サイバーレイヴンの意志力が80以上の場合、即座に満タンまで回復する。すでに傷が全快している場合、半径4セルの味方につき決断力が+1される。
languages.original_text:
Whenever the psyber-raven {g|f:fcf1f3b77e3e4cf7ba2cb960e2e6028e}relays{/g} one of the Overseer's non-attacking psychic powers, it gains +5 Willpower for 1 round. Stacks.
If the psyber-raven's Willpower is 80 or more at the end of the Overseer's turn, it immediately heals to full. If it is already at full wounds, it grants +1 resolve to each ally in a 4-cell radius.

traits.locale_text:
サイバーレイヴンが監督者の非攻撃超能力の一つを{g|f:fcf1f3b77e3e4cf7ba2cb960e2e6028e}引き継ぐ{/g}場合、1ラウンドの間意志力が+5される。この効果はスタックする。
監督者のターン終了時、サイバーレイヴンの意志力が80以上の場合、即座に満タンまで回復する。すでに傷が全快している場合、半径4セルの味方につき決断力が+1される。

サイバーレイヴンが監督者の非攻撃超能力の一つを{g|f:fcf1f3b77e3e4cf7ba2cb960e2e6028e}引き継ぐ{/g}場合、1ラウンドの間意志力が+5される。この効果はスタックする。
監督者のターン終了時、サイバーレイヴンの意志力が80以上の場合、即座に満タンまで回復する。すでに傷が全快している場合、半径4セルの味方につき決断力が+1される。

languages.text:
{g|f:fcf1f3b77e3e4cf7ba2cb960e2e6028e}Ретранслируя{/g} неатакующую {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerPowersGlossary}психосилу{/g} надзирателя, псайберворон получает +5 к {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Воле{/g} на 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}раунд{/g}. Суммируется.
Если на конец {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}хода{/g} надзирателя Воля псайберворона равна или больше 80, псайберворон полностью восстанавливает свое {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}здоровье{/g}. Если его запас здоровья уже полон, он на 1 увеличивает {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}решимость{/g} каждого союзника в 4 клетках от себя.
languages.original_text:
Whenever the psyber-raven {g|f:fcf1f3b77e3e4cf7ba2cb960e2e6028e}relays{/g} one of the Overseer's non-attacking psychic powers, it gains +5 Willpower for 1 round. Stacks.
If the psyber-raven's Willpower is 80 or more at the end of the Overseer's turn, it immediately heals to full. If it is already at full wounds, it grants +1 resolve to each ally in a 4-cell radius.

traits.locale_text:
{g|f:fcf1f3b77e3e4cf7ba2cb960e2e6028e}Ретранслируя{/g} неатакующую психосилу надзирателя, псайберворон получает +5 к Воле на 1 раунд. Суммируется.
Если на конец хода надзирателя Воля псайберворона равна или больше 80, псайберворон полностью восстанавливает свое здоровье. Если его запас здоровья уже полон, он на 1 увеличивает решимость каждого союзника в 4 клетках от себя.

{g|f:fcf1f3b77e3e4cf7ba2cb960e2e6028e}Ретранслируя{/g} неатакующую психосилу надзирателя, псайберворон получает +5 к Воле на 1 раунд. Суммируется.
Если на конец хода надзирателя Воля псайберворона равна или больше 80, псайберворон полностью восстанавливает свое здоровье. Если его запас здоровья уже полон, он на 1 увеличивает решимость каждого союзника в 4 клетках от себя.
